## Validation Checklist
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally using `bun run build` and `bun test`.
- [ ] I have added my new chapter to the book's `SUMMARY.md` (if applicable).
- [ ] I have verified that any changes to commands, architectures, or features are accurately updated in the `README.md`.
- [ ] I confirm this is my original work and I agree to license it under the repository's terms.
